texto: We owe the Aboriginal peoples a debt that is four centuries old. It is their turn to become full partners in developing an even greater Canada. And the reconciliation required may be less a matter of legal texts than of attitudes of the heart.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Romeo LeBlanc sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “We owe the Aboriginal peoples a debt that is four centuries old. It is their turn to become full …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, heart, canada, útil em momentos de canada e debt.
